snippet.sync_client:
from seed import SeedApi

client = SeedApi(
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)
client.list_plants()
snippet.async_client:
import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedApi

client = AsyncSeedApi(
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)


async def main() -> None:
    await client.list_plants()


asyncio.run(main())

snippet.sync_client:
from seed import SeedApi

client = SeedApi(
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)
client.get_plant(
    plant_id="plantId",
)
snippet.async_client:
import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedApi

client = AsyncSeedApi(
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)


async def main() -> None:
    await client.get_plant(
        plant_id="plantId",
    )


asyncio.run(main())
